invite_important_text: Only valid and completed registrations count toward your goal. In the future, your invite code can also be replaced by a direct invite link.

faq_intro: Here you can find quick answers about Remdy.
faq_what_is_remdy_a: A friendship and language practice app with real people.
faq_how_premium_works_a: Premium unlocks extra features. You can see the details on the Premium screen.
faq_why_cant_talk_some_countries_q: Why can't I talk to some countries?
faq_why_cant_talk_some_countries_a: On the free plan, you can only chat with your own country. Other countries appear as Premium.
faq_change_language_q: How do I change the app language?
faq_change_language_a: Open Menu > Language and select Português, English, Español or Français.
faq_notifications_a: Open Menu > Notifications and adjust the options. On your phone, also check the app permissions.
contact_subtitle: Choose a channel. If it's locked, you can enable it later.
cannot_open_link: Could not open on your device.
terms_intro_short: Please read carefully. By using Remdy, you agree to these terms.
terms_welcome: Welcome to Remdy. By using the app, you agree to the terms below.
terms_about_intro: Remdy is a platform designed to:
terms_not_dating_app: Remdy is not a dating app
terms_no_bots: and does not use bots to chat with users.
terms_rules_intro: By using the app, you agree to:
terms_rules_item_2: Not send offensive, illegal, or inappropriate content
terms_rules_item_3: Not share pornography, violence, or hate speech
terms_rules_item_4: Not send malicious links or spam
terms_rules_item_5: Not try to deceive or scam others
terms_rules_consequence: Accounts that violate these rules may be warned, suspended, or permanently banned without prior notice in serious cases.
terms_photos_item_1: You declare that you have the rights to use those images
terms_photos_item_2: You must not send offensive or inappropriate photos
terms_photos_item_3: Remdy may remove content that violates the rules
terms_privacy_intro: Remdy only collects data necessary for operation, such as:
terms_privacy_usage: This data is used only for app functionality and security.
terms_privacy_no_sell: Remdy does not sell personal data.
terms_security_intro: Remdy strives to maintain a safe environment, but:
terms_security_item_1: Cannot guarantee the behavior of other users
terms_security_item_2: Recommends not sharing sensitive personal information
terms_premium_item_2: Subscriptions follow the rules of the App Store or Google Play
terms_availability_text: The app may undergo maintenance, receive updates, and change features without prior notice.
terms_account_closure_user: The user may stop using the app at any time.
terms_account_closure_remdy: Remdy may terminate accounts that violate the terms.
terms_changes_text_1: The terms may be updated to improve the service.
terms_changes_text_2: Continued use of the app means acceptance of the changes.
privacy_share_text: Remdy does not sell personal data. Information is used only for service operation.
privacy_security_text: Your data is stored on secure servers using technologies like Firebase.
privacy_user_content_text: Users are responsible for their messages. Offensive, illegal, or abusive content may result in a ban.
privacy_changes_text: This policy may be updated at any time.
about_remdy_paragraph_1: Remdy is an app created to connect real people around the world in a simple, natural, and safe way.
about_remdy_paragraph_2: We live in a time with many social networks, but few truly help people build real connections. Remdy was born with a different purpose: to bring people, cultures, and languages closer through real conversations.
about_remdy_paragraph_3: Learning a language, making friends in other countries, or discovering new cultures should not be difficult.
about_remdy_paragraph_4: We believe the best way to learn is by talking, sharing experiences, and living the language in everyday life.
about_remdy_paragraph_5: That is why Remdy was created to allow anyone to:
about_remdy_paragraph_6: No complications. No confusing algorithms. Just people connecting with people.
about_remdy_global_title: A global app from the beginning
about_remdy_paragraph_7: Remdy was designed for the world. From day one, the goal has always been to create an international community.
about_remdy_paragraph_8: Creating a healthy environment is a priority. We work with clear rules, moderation, and controls to protect users.
about_remdy_paragraph_9: Remdy is still growing, and many new features are on the way.
about_remdy_thanks_title: Thank you for being part of it
about_remdy_paragraph_10: Remdy is not just an app. It is a global community built by people, for people.

remi_intro_body:
Practice real-life conversations with Remi.

You can:
🔊 Listen to answers
🌐 Translate answers
🗣️ See pronunciation

Just type naturally. Remi will help you step by step.
